raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "reporting a personal introspective observation about the directional relationship between mood and behavior",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "mood and behavior are separable phenomena capable of directional influence",
    "the speaker has sufficient self-observation data to compare relative frequencies",
    "a predominant pattern (behavior → mood) exists more often than the reverse"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; expresses a clear empirical self-claim without contradiction or vagueness",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the observation must be accurate, based on reliable self-monitoring, and used to guide adaptive behavioral changes that improve mood",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the reported pattern stems from biased recall, ignores confounding variables, or leads to erroneous causal assumptions about mood regulation"
}
